channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Debris from Hurricane Helene is helping fuel Georgia’s wildfires
Airlines in Europe slash thousands of flights as Iran war cuts jet fuel supplies
item.description: The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fu...

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
item.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

item.title: LaGuardia firefighter heard ‘stop, stop, stop’ before deadly crash but didn’t know who it was for
Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says
item.description: Artisan may be known for their bold “Stop Hiring Humans” campaign but the reality is every founder needs to assemble the right team if they want to sc...

item.title: Can a mentalist trick Trump? Oz Pearlman will try in a room full of journalists
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Dinner will be headlined by a mentalist instead of a comedian. Oz Pearlman tells NPR he hopes to unify, delight and pu...

item.title: Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug in a historic shift
item.description: A cannabis industry group calls President Donald Trump’s reclassification of state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug “the most signi...

item.title: Author details the spy network that took on America's post-WWII Nazi groups
item.description: In The Secret War Against Hate , Steven J. Ross details the racist, anti-Semitic groups that sprang up in the latter half of the 20th century — and th...

item.title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
item.description: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.

item.title: The Fed’s High-Stakes Power Struggle Affects Much More Than Mortgage Rates
item.description: Something is brewing at the Federal Reserve, and it’s starting to get ugly. For many months, President Trump has been pressuring the Fed to lower the ...

item.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
item.description: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

item.title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
item.description: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.

item.title: Trump administration eases rules on some marijuana categories. Here's what to know
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said he is immediately moving medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, which includes drugs like ketami...

item.title: How mosquitoes — and malaria — helped shape the whereabouts of early humankind
item.description: A new study looks at an unexpected force that played a critical role in shaping the lives of ancient humans.

item.title: Michael Zuber: Why the Average American Won’t Make It Without Rentals
item.description: By buying just One Rental at a Time, Michael Zuber was able to replace his entire W-2 income, scale from one rental to four, then to over 80 rental un...

item.title: BiggerPockets Pulse: Investor Sentiment Falls Amid International Turmoil and Renewed Economic Concerns
item.description: Retail investors’ hopes for improved market conditions are fading in the second quarter of 2026, but many investors still plan to actively grow their ...

item.title: Sweeping Zoning Reforms Presents Opportunities For Multifamily Investments
item.description: With the affordability crisis stinging American pocketbooks and small landlords struggling to maintain cash flow amid high interest rates and property...

item.title: Need Money for a Down Payment? Try These 8 Side Hustles (That Actually Work)
item.description: Don’t have enough cash for a down payment or enough income to qualify for a mortgage? You’re not alone—many rookies have been (or are) in your shoes. ...
